prerequisites: An active Mantle account (heymantle.com) with an app added to Mantle and API access enabled.
A Mantle App API key generated for your app (used as the connector's api_key).
A start_date value marking the earliest record date to begin syncing.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates to the Mantle API with a single secret api_key. In Mantle this is an App API key generated in the dashboard under your app's API settings. The connector uses it to read the customers and subscriptions streams. The key should only be used in a backend service and never exposed in frontend code or committed to source control.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Mantle App API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Mantle and make sure your app has been added. In the left sidebar select your app, click API, then click Add API key. Provide a name and click Create. Copy the generated App API key and treat it as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the Mantle App API key into the connector's required api_key field. This authenticates all requests the connector makes to the Mantle API.

setupSteps.title: Set the start_date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should sync data. The connector uses it as the cutoff for incremental syncs of the customers and subscriptions streams.

setupSteps.title: Test the connection
setupSteps.body: Save the configuration and run the connector's connection test to confirm the api_key is valid and the customers and subscriptions streams are reachable before scheduling syncs.
